# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  access_log_path: /dev/stdout
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901

stats_config:
  stats_tags:
    - cluster

access_loggers:
  - name: envoy.access_loggers.file
    typed_config:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.accessloggers.file.v2.FileAccessLogConfig
      path: /dev/stdout

stats_sinks:
  - name: envoy.statsd
    typed_config:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.statsd.v3.StatsdSink
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: localhost
          port_value: 8125
